description: Extract 16 critical fields from Home Loan / Mortgage Application Documents for impactful demo showcasing complete underwriting automation

borrowerName.demo_impact: Critical for identity verification and application matching

propertyAddress.description: Subject property address - the asset being financed
propertyAddress.demo_impact: Links loan to specific asset, enables property risk assessment

loanAmount.demo_impact: Primary decision factor - determines exposure and product eligibility

purchasePrice.demo_impact: Essential for LTV calculation and risk assessment

appraisedValue.description: Appraised market value from professional property appraisal
appraisedValue.demo_impact: Independent valuation used for final LTV and collateral assessment

downPaymentAmount.description: Borrower's down payment contribution in USD
downPaymentAmount.demo_impact: Shows borrower equity stake and reduces lender risk

loanType.description: Type of loan product (Conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, Jumbo)
loanType.demo_impact: Determines underwriting guidelines and compliance requirements

interestRate.demo_impact: Key pricing metric affecting affordability and profitability

occupancyType.description: How borrower will use property (Primary Residence, Second Home, Investment)
occupancyType.demo_impact: Primary residences have lower default rates - critical risk factor

closingDate.description: Expected or actual loan closing date
closingDate.demo_impact: Critical for pipeline management and coordination of parties

employerName.description: Current employer name for primary borrower
employerName.demo_impact: Validates income source stability and reputation

annualIncome.description: Total annual gross income from all sources in USD
annualIncome.demo_impact: Primary qualification metric - must support debt obligations

monthlyIncome.description: Total monthly gross income in USD
monthlyIncome.demo_impact: Used for DTI calculation - key underwriting metric

totalMonthlyDebt.description: Sum of all monthly debt obligations (auto, student, credit cards, etc.)
totalMonthlyDebt.demo_impact: Critical for DTI ratio - determines if borrower can afford new payment

creditScore.demo_impact: Primary risk indicator - affects rate, approval, and insurance requirements

totalAssets.description: Total value of liquid and non-liquid assets in USD
totalAssets.demo_impact: Demonstrates financial reserves for down payment, closing costs, and emergency cushion
